text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Voting by Axioms" by Marie Christin Schmidtlein and Ulle Endriss was published in the proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023), not as a standalone article in the journal titled "Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems." Given that the authors and title are correct, this is a minor venue misattribution and not a hallucination.

LINK: https://ifaamas.org/Proceedings/aamas2023/pdfs/p2113.pdf
FOUND_TITLE: Voting by Axioms
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Christin Schmidtlein, Ulle Endriss
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
